verdictSummary: Zero PUBLIC_SAFE_USCE claims emitted; all 48 claims are appropriately gated as CAUTION_SAFE_INTERNAL_REVIEW (20), FUTURE_LANE_ONLY (27), or HUMAN_REVIEW_REQUIRED (1). The medical-students page references electives and a CURE program but quotes lack definite-offer specificity (no public eligibility, application path, or contact for visiting/IMG students) and were correctly held at CAUTION. No scope conflicts, no overclaims, no duplicates. Ledger is internally consistent and safe to merge.
